channel.title: Frontiers in Materials | New and Recent Articles
channel.description: Recent articles from Frontiers in Materials

item.title: High-entropy oxide thin films with tunable bandgap for photocatalytic CO2 reduction
item.description: We synthesize (Mg,Co,Ni,Cu,Zn)O high-entropy oxide thin films by pulsed laser deposition and demonstrate continuous bandgap tuning from 1.9 to 2.7 eV through cation ratio control. Photocatalytic CO2-to-CO conversion under visible illumination reaches an apparent quantum yield of 6.8% at 450 nm, the highest reported for single-phase HEO photocatalysts. In-situ XAFS shows that under-coordinated Cu sites act as the dominant active centers and remain stable through 200 h of continuous irradiation. The single-step deposition route is compatible with roll-to-roll substrates, opening a path to scalable solar fuel reactors.
item.author: Yuki Tanabe

item.title: Editorial: Reproducibility challenges in nanomaterial synthesis
